description: ColoringBook Redmond (artificialguybr) — coloring book / line art LoRA for SD 2.1
_comment: LoRA by artificialguybr. Trained on SD 2.1 base (512px). Outputs clean coloring-book line art with blank fill areas.
_comment_model: Original stabilityai/stable-diffusion-2-1-base repo was removed by Stability AI. Using community mirror Manojb/stable-diffusion-2-1-base (55k downloads/month).
_comment_trigger: Trigger words: include both 'Coloring Book' and 'ColoringBookAF' in every prompt.
_comment_prompt: Use simple subject descriptions: 'A cute owl, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF', 'A lion, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF', 'Mandala, Coloring Book, ColoringBookAF'.
_comment_negative: Not required; 'shaded, colored, gradients' can help enforce clean black-and-white line output.
_comment_steps: 30 steps is the recommended default per the model card examples.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7.5 per model card examples. Range 6–9 works.
_comment_lora_scale: Default 0.9. Lower values (0.7) reduce line-art effect; 1.0 gives maximum coloring-book look.
_comment_size: SD 2.1 base native resolution is 512x512. 768x768 also supported.
